description:
Rhodinol has a fresh and natural rosy note enhanced by a tonic and refreshing minty effect.
Fractionally distilled by Synarome (France) from Madagascan and Egyptian Geranium Oil. The main constituents are Geraniol and Citronellol with a trace of Menthone and has a very clean rich floral flowery Rose-Geranium odour with very little of the earthy notes of Geranium. Excellent in all fine Feminine perfumes, especially Rose, Muguet based florals. Useful in Masculine fragrances too where it forms wonderful Fougere accords with Coumarin, Patchouli or Amber, Oriental notes.

Very good in all types of feminine and masculine fragrances.

description:
Rice Bran oil is a fairly stable fixed oil with a shelf life of up to 1 year when kept cool. It has the almost ideal blend (~1:1) of mono and poly unsaturated oils with high levels of Vitamin E and gamma-Oryzanol.
Rice Bran Oil is a bland smelling oily carrier oil. It has a viscous texture with slow absorption into the skin. Ideal for mixing with other lighter carrier oils or blends (10-20%) to increase richness to aid a prolonged massage without constant re-application. 
Not really recommended as a solvent in perfumery compounds due to poor solubility of resins, citrus oils (terpenes), powders and crystals.
odour_raw:
The odour and uses of Rice Bran Oil - Fixed Oil

                                          
                                          
                                           Stable fixed oil with traces of vitamin C and high Oryzanol content for use in massage oils. Sticky so recommended to use with lighter oils. Food for the skin.

A transparent floral Rose and Muguet note with a slight green aspect 

Synonyms: Phenoxanol, Mefrosol
odour_raw:
The odour and uses of Rose Absolute Pentalol (Mefrosol)

                                          
                                          
                                          fresh floral rose absolute geranium green: : A transparent floral rose and muguet note with a slight green aspect Use:: PHENYLHEXANOL gives good effect at a low level (e.g. 1pc) yet can be used with excellent results up to 20pc. Because of its soft flowery note it can be used in all perfume types. Although not a strong material the presence of PHENYLHEXANOL is noticeable throughout the fragrance. Extremely long lasting and more tenacious than phenylethyl alcohol. Floral, Fresh, Rosy Use: Mefrosol is a diffusive, fresh, rosy floral chemical. It is used to give freshness and volume in both floral and citrus fragrances. Floral, Rose, Geranium Use: Diffusive, fresh, floral, rose absolute type. Unusually long lasting. description: Rose de Mai Absolute is rich, heavy rose, which has a dry petal quality.
odour_raw: The odour and uses of Rose de Mai Absolute | Odour=> Rose de Mai Absolute is rose with a spicy, balsamic, and prominent mossy character. As an absolute, it is the heaviest and richest of all the roses. Rose de Mai is complex containing top, middle, and base notes of its own. The opening is balsamic and very oily; in its undiluted form it leaves a thick russet colour on the smelling strip. As it settles, it takes on a sweeter, narcotic character and loses some of its mossy nature. In the final stages of the dry down, the top and mid notes are still apparent but the spicy, clove/eugenol aspect becomes more noticeable. When added to a formula it can produce a beautiful if faint lychee quality; Other key descriptors: balsamic, rose, petals, faint honey, spicy, clove, yeast, moss, faint phenol | Synaesthesia=> A table has been laid with rich loaf; spices and halfmoon slivers of nuts hang on its dark crust. Family is here and your heart is warm. Big sister has come home from the perfumery. As she opens the door, the air is suddenly awake with beauty. She hands an empty basket to the maid, the source of this gift which has made the family holiday alight with fragrant dreams. Family, heart, love | Perfume-Uses=> For all types of muguet fragrances, adds richness and beauty | Just-try-it=>

description: Rose Otto Anatolian is rich, fresh rose with marked herbal and mossy qualities.
odour_raw: The odour and uses of Rose Otto Anatolian | Odour=>Rose Otto Anatolian has a similar scent profile to Rose de Mai absolute except that its mossy character is not as prominent and it is fresher. On its far dry down it takes on a spicier and smells faintly of cinnamon and cloves. Other qualities are: rose petal, faint fruity and lychee, clove, metallic geranium. As it dries down, like Rose de Mai, it loses some of the heavy mossy character and becomes a “cleaner” rose. | Synaesthesia=> | Perfume-Uses=> For rose, citrus top-note colognes, turkish-delight | Just-try-it=> | Tips=>

description: Rose Otto Bulgarian is a sweeter “cleaner” rose with a spicy aroma.
odour_raw: The odour and uses of Rose Otto Bulgarian | Odour=>Rose Otto Bulgarian has a clean, fresh opening, especially compared to Anatolian and Rose de Mai, which have an apparent, thick balsam-like quality. Like Rose de Mai and Rose Anatolia, Rose Bulgarian also has a mossy/yeasty and spicy quality, but it only becomes prominent in the dry down. The longer it develops, the richer and more balsamic it becomes. Arguably one of the highest quality rose available on the market. | Synaesthesia=> perfection, the perfect rose, perfect mood, pristine | Perfume-Uses=> green cortex | Just-try-it=> | Tips=>

description: Rose Oxide is a solid floral-rose with faint sweet-fruity touches. It is diffusive and penetrating.
odour_raw:
The odour and uses of Rose Oxide | Odour=>Can aid in creating a realistic rose but it is very stout despite some of its linalool freshess. It is sometimes described as a “gassy-green” or “hard green” floral with lots of lift but poor longevity. Certain materials have a less gassy more 'bread-like' topnote (Rose de Mai) which is warmer and more pleasant than the 'gassy' type of odor | Synaesthesia=> A rose crawls out of the bouquet and chastises you with a baritone voice | Perfume-Uses=>To give immense lift/diffusiveness especially in a rose fragrance, but should be used in small amounts. Other uses: Rose geranium Rose, Fir-Conifer, For-diffusion, Floral-types, Topnotes, Herbal-types, Soap-perfumes, Add-lift,

description:
Safflower Oil is a non-volatile plant oil  used as a carrier and in massage oils. Safflower Oil has a bland odour with a light texture and quick absorption into the skin. Add a just enough to a too-slow absorbing blend (e.g 5-10%) to give you the desired absorption rate. 
Not really recommended as a solvent in perfumery compounds due to poor solubility of resins, citrus oils (terpenes), powders and crystals plus will tend to produce rancid notes.
odour_raw:
The odour and uses of Safflower Oil - Fixed Oil

                                          
                                          
                                          Bland oily odour : Used as carrier oil for essential oils or masage oil. Medium light oil moderate absorbtion into the skin.

description: The finest Saffron extracted with natural triglycerides to give a decolorized natural oil based Saffron. This light yellow oil is more suitable for applications in massage, creams, lotions and cosmetics where the red Saffron may discolour the product. It captures the full Saffron odour character but has a more transparent, crisp odour than the red Saffron giving it a modern fragrance appeal, great for light florals, Rose, Muguet / Lily-of-the-Valley, Freesia, Cyclamen and more masculine perfumes with  Hay, Tobacco, Leather, Suede, Fresh Woods. We use a full 30 strands (stigmas) from 10 crocus sativus flowers to make each gram of oil! description: Sandela 85 (Givaudan) is one of the most natural smelling synthetic sandawood notes. 85 refers to it being thinned with 15% of IPM (iso Propyl Myristate) for easier handling as the neat material is extremely viscous the original Sandela was always 50% in IPM but they renamed it Sandela "50" when launching "85". Keywords:sandalwood oriental fougere chypre muguet santal fixative.  Even though Sandela 50 or Sandela 85 are quite powerful some people find them virtually odourless. If this is the case for you smelling it from the skin may work better for you to evaluate it Note Sandela 85 is very viscous so if you are new to perfumery you may want to consider Sandela 50

description:
Skatole (Methyl Indole) has a very animalic civet-like odour but not as fecal with cleaner napthalene decaying-flesh facets too.
If creating a Civet replacement or needing a cleaner Civet note this is a must. Other fragrances where this may be useful are Leather, Animalic, Chypre, Tobacco and traces (less than 0.01%) in any floral especially White florals, Floral Orientals Earthy, Oceanic fragrances but here you will need to dilute to 1% or less before using it. 
Warning very powerful we recommend experiencing this as a 1% dilution the first few times you try it.
Note can cause severe discolouration like its relative Indole.

The odour and uses of Skatole

 Narcotic-florals Animalic-Chypre 
 Cheese Nut Grape

description:
Solubilizer (Polysorbate 20) is a water solubiliser for essential oils and perfume compounds. It has a faint warm-oily shampoo like note. Use from 4 parts Polysorbate 20 to, 1 part oil or compound. Mix the Polysorbate with the oil or perfume compound well then add the water slowly, stirring all the time. Note: Using some ethanol (20-30%) with the water will help the clarity of the end product and you may be able to reduce the amount of solubilizer necessary.
As with all solubilisers the exact amount required for a completely clear solution depends on each compounds own ingredients and some materials like citrus oils and resins are almost impossible to get completely clear.
odour_raw:
The odour and uses of Solubilizer (Polysorbate 20)

                                          
                                          
                                          Odour=>  They all have only very faint warm-oily odor or practically no odor while they do have a bitter taste in concentrations exceeding 500 ppm They all have only very faint warm-oily odor or practically noodor while they do have a bitter taste in concentrations exceeding 500 ppm

description:
Solubilizer Extra Clear is the Rolls Royce of water solubilisers! A high grade very efficient solubilizer blend. It has a bland surfactant-like odour with a faint solvent note. Use from 1 part Extra Clear to 1 part oil/compound. Mix it with the oil or perfume compound well then add the water, in the beginning drop by drop, stirring it into a paste. As soon as the paste starts to become runny add the rest of the water quickly stirring rapidly, stirring all the time. Note: Using a little ethanol (10-20%) with the water may help the clarity of the end product and reduce the amount of solubiliser necessary.
As with all solubilisers the exact amount required for a completely clear solution depends on each compounds own ingredients and some materials like citrus oils and resins are almost impossible to get completely clear.

The odour and uses of Solubilizer Extra Clear

description:
Solubilizer PWS is to help essential oils and perfumes mix into water based products. It has a bland faint oily surfactant note. Use from 2 parts or more solubiliser to 1 part compound. Its about 2x more efficient than Polysorbate 20. Mix it with the oil or perfume compound well then add the water slowly, stirring all the time. Note: Using a little ethanol (10-20%) with the water will help the clarity of the end product.
As with all solubilisers the exact amount required for a completely clear solution depends on each compounds own ingredients and some materials like citrus oils and resins are almost impossible to get completely clear.

 Suederal is used in a variety of perfumes, including floral, woody, and oriental scents. It is often used in combination with other ingredients such as sandalwood, cedarwood, and patchouli to create a warm and inviting scent. It is also used in some citrus-based fragrances to add a hint of smokiness.

description:
Sunflower Oil is a non-volatile plant oil  used as a carrier and in massage oils.
Sunflower Oil has a bland odour with a light texture and quick absorption into the skin. Add a just enough to a too-slow absorbing blend (e.g 10-30%) to give you the desired absorption rate. 
Not really recommended as a solvent in perfumery compounds due to poor solubility of resins, citrus oils (terpenes), powders and crystals plus will tend to produce rancid notes.
odour_raw:
The odour and uses of Sunflower Oil - Fixed Oil

                                          
                                          
                                          Bland oily odour Used as carrier oil for essential oils or massage oil. Light texture and good absorbyion into the skin. Slightly cooling effect.

When making a massage oil blend this is one of the most popular oils and may make up to 80% of the total mix. It is fairly stable and with cool storage can be kept for up to one year.

description: A low odour stabilizing and fixative base that increases the viscosity of a fragrance compound with a combination of physical, chemical and layering factors. Used between 1 and 30% compound it can increase the measured viscosity by up to 300% and the odour life of a fragrance compound up to 300% on a smelling strip. Performance depends on the other components in the compound and product application base.

Performance depends on the other components in compound and product application base.

synonyms: $TW : Tobacco Fleuressence™ is a primary odour perfume compound base, a mixture of aroma chemicals, isolates and essential oils for use in perfume compounding. Used with other aroma materials and essential oils it is great for quickly adding special effects, rapid prototyping and perfume creation. When combined with other Fleuressence bases, as in the Fleuressence Custom Creation Kit, it forms a part of a powerful super-fast and flexible system of perfume creation for most fine perfumery applications. description:
Tolu Balsam Absolute has a rich sweet balsamic vanilla spicy plum sweet floral peppery-undertone balsamic-floral oriental spice prune raisin.
Note: Tolu Balsam Absolute does not contain any added softening agent like Benzyl Benzoate. It is Solid and requires considerable heating and time to soften and dissolve. Consider using Tolu Balsam Resinoid which contains Benzyl Benzoate from source (viscous) or a dlution (mobile).

Perfume-Uses=>  Oriental Balsam Spice
 Prune Plum Raisin Vanilla

description:
Tonkarome has an intense ambery and powerful tonka bean character, developing powdery and sweet notes of tobacco and almond. It gives a long lasting and natural coumarin aspect.
It blends very well in fougere accords. It also works with floral and woody notes.
It can help to replace tonka bean absolute.

A dilution of Trans-2, cis-6 Nonadienal 1% in DPG
A powerful green cucumber and violet leaf odor in dilution with a hint of melon
Powerful and diffusive. Adds green, leafy, watery, floral notes to all odor types.

description: Triethyl Citrate (TEC) is a versatile solvent for oily products, crystals, powders and resins. It is almost odourless with slight hints of mild fruity wine and plum notes. A potential replacement for the highly toxic DEP (Phthalates) for difficult to dissolve ingredients, TEC is also approved for use in flavours.

The odour and uses of Triethyl Citrate (TEC)

                                          
                                          
                                          Odour=>  virtually odourless mild fruity Very mild but sweet and pleasant wineyfruity Plum-like odor

 Solvent Plum, Wine, Berry, Butter, Butterscotch, Cherry, Honey, Fruit-flavour, Baked-foods,

description: (Reported as a pheromone imparting a secure, comforting, cared for feeling) *Not available in Thailand
odour_raw:
The odour and uses of Truffle Concentrate

                                          
                                          
                                          Using Beta-Androstenol 1000 ppm Concentrate.
We recommended to using Beta-Androstenol 1000 ppm in fragrance compounds at a maximum of 0.01 to 0.1% (w/w) 0.1 to 1 gram per Kg or Litre of perfume compound. This will ensure that the active Androstenol content does not exceed 1 ppm 1 part-per-million which has been found to be the upper limit at which the pheromones are esthetically acceptable.
The materials used are high purity reconstructions using synthetic sources and no human or animal extracts were used in their production.
Beta-Androstenol is found in truffles, and is offered as an explanation for how pigs locate them deep in the ground. It is endogenous to humans and pigs, behaving as a pheromone and contributing to axillary odor. Androstenol is biosynthesized in the testes, the adrenal glands and the ovaries in humans. In addition, androstenol may be synthesized in the human nasal mucosa from androstenone, and likely also from androstadienol and androstadienone in this area.
Due to its ability to cross the blood-brain-barrier, androstenols are likely present in the central nervous system as well. In animals, androstenols have been found to produce anxiolytic-like, antidepressant-like, and anticonvulsant effects. They also been found to modify the behavioral and social responses of humans.
It has been proposed that androstenol may be involved in the menstrual synchrony of women.
Source Wikipedia.

description: (Reported as a Female pheromone attractive to Males) *Not available in Thailand
odour_raw:
The odour and uses of Ultra-Feminine Concentrate

                                          
                                          
                                          Using Estratetraenol 1000 ppm Concentrate
We recommended to using Estratetraenol 1000 ppm in fragrance compounds at a maximum of 0.01 to 0.1% (w/w) 0.1 to 1 gram per 1 Kg or 1 Litre of perfume compound. This will ensure that the active Estratetraenol content does not exceed 1 ppm 1 part-per-million which has been found to be the upper limit at which the pheromones are esthetically acceptable.
The materials used are high purity reconstructions using synthetic sources and no human or animal extracts were used in their production.
Estratetraenol was first found in the urine of pregnant women and although related to estrogen sex hormones has no estrogenic effects. It is described as having pheromone-like activiites creating an ultra-feminine aura. It has calming and caring effect on both sexes and tends to make them more sociable and kind towards each other. 
Source Wikipedia.

description: Luxury Methyl Ionone base with natural flowery Iris nuances. Long odour life on the smelling strip
odour_raw:
The odour and uses of Ultralia

                                          
                                          
                                          Flowery, Orris, Violet powdery woody, very typical of the Iris family with a strong 
Orris root character.  The most floral and rich of all qualities of methyl ionone with a strong orris, violet character and only a slight fruity nuance. Uses=>  A rich complex character combined with a great substantivity on cloth with good stability in many difficult media. Indispensable element in all high quality fine fragrances, flowery, woody, powdery, Chypre, Oriental, etc. imparting them with radiance and great elegance.

description: (Reported as a pheromone imparting a secure, comforting, cared for feeling) *Not available in Thailand
odour_raw:
The odour and uses of Unisex Concentrate

                                          
                                          
                                          Using Alpha-Androstenol 1000 ppm Concentrate
We recommended to using Androstenol 1000 ppm in fragrance compounds at a maximum of 0.01 to 0.1% (w/w) 0.1 to 1 gram per Kg or Litre of perfume compound. This will ensure that the active Androstenol content does not exceed 1 ppm 1 part-per-million which has been found to be the upper limit at which the pheromones are esthetically acceptable.
The materials used are high purity reconstructions using synthetic sources and no human or animal extracts were used in their production.
Androstenol is biosynthesized in the testes, the adrenal glands and the ovaries in humans. In addition, androstenol may be synthesized in the human nasal mucosa from androstenone, and likely also from androstadienol and androstadienone in this area.
Present in human urine, and it is also present in the blood plasma and saliva of humans and pigs as well as in the axillary sweat of humans. 
Due to its ability to cross the blood-brain-barrier, androstenols are likely present in the central nervous system as well. In animals, androstenols have been found to produce anxiolytic-like, antidepressant-like, and anticonvulsant effects. They also been found to modify the behavioral and social responses of humans.
Source Wikipedia.

description: Velvione is dry powdery velvety musk amber civet skin.
odour_raw:
The odour and uses of Velvione

                                          
                                          
                                          Odour=>  Musky, Powdery, Slightly Animalic Use: Velvione is an exceptional product: a powdery macrocyclic musk that is powerful, highly substantive and stable, as well as biodegradable. Velvione has a nitro-musk aspect that is not found either in other commonly used macrocyclic musks, nor in polycyclic musks. Velvione is excellent in all applications, including fine fragrance, where it adds a powdery volume and musky softness, and laundry care, where its high substantivity and clean musky note are highly valued.
Perfume-Uses=>  musk a nitro-musk powdery laundry care

description:
Vitamin E Acetate is almost odourless emollient virtually oily skin preparations. 
It has a viscous texture with slow absorption into the skin. Ideal for mixing with blends (0.5-1%) to increase richness and aid prolonged massage without constant re-application. Using at 20% in a very light oil base is useful preventing stretch marks but please test a small area first to make sure you do not have a reaction.
Using the Acetate of Vitamin E means that it is not an anti-oxidant for your products but the skin can utilise it and release the Vitamin E for skin moisturising, strengthening, elasticity, cell regeneration and rejuvenation. Pure Vitamin E (dark brown colour) may be far more irritating to the skin than this acetate form. 

Not really recommended as a solvent in perfumery compounds due to poor solubility of resins, citrus oils (terpenes), powders and crystals. It has no anti-oxidant properties for essential oils or perfume compounds.

description: Wardia BM is a rich, floral-rose masterpiece with a waxy, sweet, spicy green cortex. Wardia BM is a versatile and intoxicating rose with a classic, rich, and elegant profile. (This is an original Firmenich replacement for Wardia SA Formerly 6RM07492)
odour_raw: The odour and uses of Wardia BM | Odour=> Wardia BM has a similar scent profile to Rose de Mai, as it was originally intended as a reproduction of it. It is a rich aroma chemical, which smells like a seamless blend of rose and muguet flowers. It has balsamic, spicy, mossy green tones and a faint honey tinge, which instantly reminds one of Rose de Mai Absolute. Because of its rich and complex character, Wardia feels like a raw material that could be worn on its own, or as a nearly complete perfume compound by itself. As it dries on skin, the rose begins to become more prominent. Later a faint, sweet cinnamon and honey aspect emerges (a characteristic of Rose Otto Anatolia).  Other descriptors; rose, muguet, sweet, slightly powdery honey, green, floral, narcotic, spicy, wood | Synaesthesia=> | Perfume-Uses=>Blended carefully with Oud/Agarwood it can create breathtaking olfactive middle-eastern accords | Just-try-it=> | Tips=>
perfume_uses: Blended carefully with Oud/Agarwood it can create breathtaking olfactive middle-eastern accords

description: White Mineral Oil (Carnation Brand) is virtually odourless base/carrier oil very stable good feel similar to baby oil or generic massage oil. Poor solubility for powders, crystals, resins and terpenes BUT may mix with compounds containing these materials if already dissolved.
odour_raw:
The odour and uses of White Mineral Oil - Fixed Oil

                                          
                                          
                                          virtually odourless softly slightly fatty
PERFUME USES=> Mainly used as a cosmetic oil, emoillient, massage oil or component of massage oil blends: Baby Oil
Sometimes used as an oily solvent in perfume compounds for oil a wax based products eg. Candles, Melts, LIpsticks, Massage Oils. 
 Poor miscibility with terpenes, resins, polymerised materials and powdered materials and crystals  BUT may support these materials if already a part of a mixture.

description: Wintergreen Essential Oil is a powerful, intense, sweet-woody oil with noticeable camphoric qualities. Its sweet aspects can come across as faintly fruity
odour_raw: The odour and uses of Wintergreen Essential Oil | Odour=>Wintergreen Essential Oil has a green, cool-minty, almost candy-like Certs quality with noticeable herbal/camphoric features. Upon deeper examination, this oil has an “earthy” phenolic undertone which is extremely faint. It has similarities to aroma profiles of those in the B-Iceberg group such as peppermint and eucalyptus | Synaesthesia=>Certs, massage oil, muscle balm, color: blue green, relaxing smooth | Perfume-Uses=>For Hay, New Mown Hay, Orchid, Wintergreen Sweet-birch, Muscle-pain-blends, Tiger-balm, Vanilla, and Root Beer | Blends well with=>Works synergistically with cool, spice and herb notes : oregano : mints : thyme : ylang ylang : narcissus : vanilla | Tips=>For fun, try to work out how to construct a “root beer” accord using this oil.
synaesthesia: Certs, massage oil, muscle balm, color: blue green, relaxing smooth
perfume_uses: For Hay, New Mown Hay, Orchid, Wintergreen Sweet-birch, Muscle-pain-blends, Tiger-balm, Vanilla, and Root Beer
tips: For fun, try to work out how to construct a “root beer” accord using this oil.

raw_material: Ylang Comoros Complete Essential Oil F3255
description:
Ylang Comoros Complete Essential Oil F3255 (BIOLANDES)
Ylang Ylang Essential Oil has a powerful, floral and intensely sweet odor
with a fresh slightly harsh cresylic wintergreen white floral narcotic top note. It becomes more pleasant, softer and more floral sweet, slightly spicy and balsamic White Frangipani floral in the heart and base.
The oil is traditionally divided into 4 fractions as it distills firstly Extra then followed by No.1 & 2.and lastly No.3 and a Complete blend.

The Complete Oil is a blend of the first 4 fractions (mainly No.1 and No.2 plus a little Extra and No.3) in an attempt to get an optimized oil for all products.

raw_material: Ylang Comoros Extra Essential Oil F3350
description:
Ylang Comoros Extra Essential Oil F3350 (BIOLANDES)
Ylang Ylang Essential Oil has a powerful, floral and intensely sweet odor
with a fresh slightly harsh cresylic wintergreen white floral narcotic top note. It becomes more pleasant, softer and more floral sweet, slightly spicy and balsamic White Frangipani floral in the heart and base.
The oil is tradtionally divided into 4 fractions as it distills firstly Extra then followed by No.1 & 2.and lastly No.3 and a 5th Complete blend.
The Extra Oil is the finest and the most delicate of the 5 fractions. Best suited for the finest perfumery.

raw_material: Ylang Comoros III essential oil F3295
description:
Ylang Comoros III essential oil F3295 (BIOLANDES)
Ylang Ylang Essential Oil has a powerful, floral and intensely sweet odor with a fresh slightly harsh cresylic wintergreen white floral narcotic top note. It becomes more pleasant, softer and more floral sweet, slightly spicy and balsamic White Frangipani floral in the heart and base. The oil is traditionally divided into 4 fractions as it distills firstly Extra then followed by No.1 & 2.and lastly No.3 and a Complete blend.  
This No.3 Oil has more of the sesquiterpenes and is preferred more for home fragrance projects like PotPourri, Incense, Soaps etc. The Complete Oil is a blend of the first 4 fractions (mainly No.1 and No.2 plus a little Extra and No.3) in an attempt to get an optimized oil for all products.

Great for quickly adding special effects, rapid prototyping and perfume creation with easier IFRA & EU compliance. When combined with other F-TEC bases, as in the F-TEC Custom Creation Kit, it forms a powerful super-fast and flexible system of perfume creation for most fine perfumery and toiletry product applications. Ylang Madagascar Complete ORGANIC Essential Oil N1450 from Biolandes
Ylang Ylang Essential Oil has a powerful, floral and intensely sweet odor with a fresh slightly harsh cresylic wintergreen white floral narcotic top note. It becomes more pleasant, softer and more floral sweet, slightly spicy and balsamic White Frangipani floral in the heart and base. The oil is traditionally divided into 4 fractions as it distills, firstly Extra, then followed by No.1 & No.2 and lastly No.3 and a Complete blend.  This Complete Oil is an Organic Oil from Madagascar of the first 4 fractions (mainly No.1 and No.2 plus a little Extra and No.3) to get an optimized oil for all product applications.

description: Ylang Ylang Essential Oil has a sweet aromatic narcotic floral fruity jasmine ylang-ylang heady floral-balsamic spice odour. With rich creamy notes reminiscent of the notes in white-florals tuberose gardenia champaca frangipani  and in tropical fruits banana mango papaya.

The odour and uses of Ylang Ylang Essential Oil

                                          
                                          
                                          Odour=>  sweet aromatic narcotic-floral fruity jasmin ylang heady floral-balsamic spicy rich In intensely sweet, soft, floral-balsamic, slightly spicy scent-a good oil has a creamy rich top note.The other grades lack the depth and richness of the ylang ylang extra.

 Banana mango Spice Papaya

description: Z-Zolvent F-TEC is virtually odourless slightly fresh. Food Grade materials are used in is manufacture and it is a cosmetic emollient and carrier to replace ethanol in non-alcoholic perfumes. Generally improved solubility compared to the standard Fleuressence especially in candles and in waxy products.
odour_raw:
The odour and uses of Z-ZOLVENT F-TEC

                                          
                                          
                                          An almost odourless light oily solvent used in perfumes in the middle-east to replace alcohol. Solubility of powders, terpenes and resins is poor unless well mixed with other ingredients really well. It has the advantage of being a cosmetic skin grade emoillient with low flammability.

odour_raw:
The odour and uses of Z-Zolvent Fleuressence

                                          
                                          
                                          An almost odourless light oily solvent used in perfumes in the middle-east to replace alcohol. Solubility of powders, terpenes and resins is poor unless well mixed with other ingredients really well. It has the advantage of being a cosmetic skin grade emoillient with low flammability.
synonyms: $ZZ : Z-Zolvent Fleuressence™ is a primary odour perfume compound base, a mixture of aroma chemicals, isolates and essential oils for use in perfume compounding. Used with other aroma materials and essential oils it is great for quickly adding special effects, rapid prototyping and perfume creation. When combined with other Fleuressence bases, as in the Fleuressence Custom Creation Kit, it forms a part of a powerful super-fast and flexible system of perfume creation for most fine perfumery applications. Q. What are Fleuressence and F-TEC Bases?  "Fleuressence vs F-TEC"
physical_state: Colourless to yellow oily liquid Drakening on aging

description: A powerful, dry, and extremely radiant woody-amber note. It possesses a sharp, clean, and almost "metallic" vibration that provides an immediate sense of modernity and lift to any fragrance. It is less creamy than Ambroxan, focusing more on a crisp, dry, and elegant amber effect.
odour_raw:
The odour and uses of Z11 HD 8.5

                                          
                                          
                                          dry amber powdery woody musk: Ambery, Dry, Woody Use: Amberketal is a powerful ambery note for use in most applications, with good stability in non aggressive media. It is effective as a modifier in association with existing woody/ambery ingredients. description: A very clean, delicate, and highly diffusive white musk with a unique red fruit (berry-like) and slightly metallic sweetness. It possesses a "luminous" quality that is noticed much earlier in a fragrance's evaporation compared to other macrocyclic musks.

                                          sweet clean waxy musk animal: Animal, Musk Use: Soft, delicate musk, red fruit. persistent musk, herbal- and vegetable-like : Natural mild musk Use:: Can be used in the creation of any perfume.
